caption: The video presents a static informational slide regarding the "DARPA / Linux Foundation Open Software Initiative." The layout features a white background with a dark blue header and footer. The top left contains the title and the URL "https://usgovops.org," while the body text explains that "DARPA and The Linux Foundation Create Open Software Initiative to Accelerate DoD Innovation, SG End to End Stack." A quote from Dr. Jonathan Smith, DARPA Innovation Office Program Manager, is featured on the right side. The slide includes several logos, including "US GOVOPS," "DARPA," and "The Linux Foundation." A flow chart at the bottom illustrates the process from "OPS-SG Secure open source software and fast software development" through "OPS-SG ITE," "Secure SG Stack," and "A subset of sites in the DoD" to "MDLTIO design, procurement, deployment, and management." The scene remains completely unchanged across all frames, as it is a still presentation slide.
